summary: Beveled margins improve retention for both inlays and 3/4 crowns; they also reduce stress concentrations at the tooth-restoration junction, contributing significantly to structural integrity without relying heavily on other listed reasons as primary drivers according to standard protocols. The focus here should remain firmly centered on enhanced mechanical properties through improved design features like these subtle yet crucial modifications during preparation procedures before final placement. Agent2 concluded that increase retention was most aligned based upon common understanding but acknowledged broader benefits exist too which were summarized concisely highlighting their importance
